raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX. Made hotel reservations XX/XX/year> through XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) for a stay on XX/XX/year> for {$310.00} XXXX. XXXX plans - cancelled reservation through XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) on XX/XX/year>. 
XXXX. Did not see credit on credit card account in timely manner - contested charge through Citibank ( credit card company ) XXXX. XXXX. XXXX from Citibank dated XX/XX/year> stating they are working on dispute.

XXXX. We are attaching copies of all documents.
